backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON metadata file containing summaries of all frontend components, describing a conversion-focused landing page for a digital planner product with sections for hero, benefits, previews, audience, and CTAs.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors using CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, title 'Organized Digital Life', and root div mounting the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the complete landing page by rendering HeroSection, BenefitsSection, PreviewSection, AudienceSection, FinalCTASection, and Footer in sequence.
Section component displaying a 'Who It's For' heading with a bulleted list of four target audiences (students, professionals, entrepreneurs, anyone seeking structure) using scroll animation and decorative accent dots.
Section component showcasing four product benefits in a responsive grid with check icons, titles, and descriptions, featuring hover effects and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/CTAButton.tsx: Reusable call-to-action button component with lavender styling, rounded full design, hover scale effects, and default scroll-to-top behavior when clicked.
Final conversion section with 'Start Planning Smarter Today' headline and centered CTA button, using scroll animation for fade-in effect.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal footer displaying Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking, dynamic copyright year, and subtle border styling.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section featuring main headline about staying organized in 2026, subheadline, iPad mockup image, and primary CTA button with scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/PreviewSection.t: Section displaying three planner preview images (weekly layout, daily layout, habit tracker) in a responsive grid with hover shadow effects and scroll animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing Internet Computer actor creation with authentication support, handling both anonymous and authenticated actors, and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed for this static landing page.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when elements enter the viewport and trigger visibility state for fade-in animations with configurable threshold.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet extending Tailwind with OKLCH color system for soft beige/lavender theme, custom CTA colors, Playfair Display for headings, Inter for body text, increased border radius, and fade-in animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root with QueryClient provider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended spacing, typography, animations, and plugins for container queries and typography.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a single-page landing page for a 2026 Rainbow Digital Planner with mobile-first design, soft beige/lavender aesthetic, and conversion-focused layout targeting women aged 18-35 from Pinterest traffic.
